metadata.description: The GitKraken Cursor Plugin wraps our MCP Server and turns your AI assistant into a context-aware development partner by connecting it to git history, branches, issues, pull requests, and multi-repo workflows through GitKraken. It works with all the providers you would expect from the GitKraken software suite such as GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, Bitbucket, Jira and more.

plugins.name: gitkraken
